payload.answer: Processed the duplicate Slack delivery as a single event and captured one preference memory.

entity_resolution.reason: The same Slack event ID was delivered twice, so the intake should be treated idempotently and produce only one memory card.

memory_cards.statement: Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans.

details: Only one memory card was emitted.
No superseded or deleted facts were presented as current.
